title: Entry Queue Congestion Threshold
excerpt: Escalate when ingress queues obstruct circulation or exceed target wait times.
body: Dispatch crowd-flow staff to open overflow stanchions. Shift screening capacity when adjacent gates have headroom. Publish internal gate updates for operations channels.
searchText: entry queue congestion gate crowd flow overflow stanchions screening

title: Accessibility Infrastructure Outage Response
excerpt: Mobility-impacting elevator failures require immediate dispatch and alternate route coverage.
body: Dispatch engineering to confirm elevator status. Station accessibility staff at the nearest alternate route. Flag guest services to reroute impacted guests.
searchText: elevator outage accessibility alternate route facilities guest services

title: Guest Mobility Assistance Standard
excerpt: Guests requesting wheelchair access require direct acknowledgement and escorted support.
body: Acknowledge the guest request immediately. Dispatch guest services with a wheelchair-access kit. Confirm handoff and route to destination seating.
searchText: wheelchair assist guest mobility escort guest services section
